name: Bain Capital Specialty Finance, Inc.
summary: PART I General Bain Capital Specialty Finance, Inc. (the Company) was formed on October 5, 2015 (Inception) as a Delaware corporation structured as an externally managed, closed-end, non-diversified management investment company. The Company commenced investment operations on October 13, 2016 (Commencement). The Company has elected to be treated as a business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (the 1940 Act). In addition, the Company has elected to be ...
